_meta.method: Checked Plum Village sangha directory, Wake Up site, Kwan Um international center list, and general Buddhist directories for any Nigeria entries connected to Plum Village, Kwan Um, or AZI; none were found.
_meta.coverageEstimate: 0% (no verified Plum Village / Kwan Um / AZI Zen practice places identified).
knownGaps: There may be small study or mindfulness groups in Lagos, Abuja, or other cities, but they are not listed as official Plum Village or Kwan Um sanghas with fixed weekly venues in public directories.
Most African Kwan Um and Zen listings currently documented are in South Africa, not Nigeria.
